name: DaVinci Miqro-C Pearl Replacement
summary: The DaVinci MIQRO-C Zirconia Pearl is an official replacement component engineered for use with the DaVinci MIQRO-C Vaporiser.
description: The DaVinci MIQRO-C Zirconia Pearl is an official replacement component engineered for use with the DaVinci MIQRO-C Vaporiser. Installed within the oven lid, this precision-made pearl supports even heat distribution and optimised oven efficiency. By reducing the effective oven chamber size, the pearl enables more efficient vaporisation of smaller loads while maintaining consistent thermal performance. Manufactured from high-grade zirconia ceramic, it delivers durability, heat stability, and clean flavour output—making it an essential maintenance item for MIQRO-C users. Keeps your device charged and ready.
